BSB (Better-Service-Base) - LLM Index

Use this index to keep context minimal. Each link is a focused guide.

Node.js:
- Bootstrap a new project:
  https://bsbcode.dev/llms/nodejs-bootstrap.txt
- Create a new plugin:
  https://bsbcode.dev/llms/nodejs-plugin-new.txt
- Service plugin guidance:
  https://bsbcode.dev/llms/nodejs-plugin-service.txt
- Events plugin guidance:
  https://bsbcode.dev/llms/nodejs-plugin-events.txt
- Observable plugin guidance:
  https://bsbcode.dev/llms/nodejs-plugin-observable.txt
- Config plugin guidance:
  https://bsbcode.dev/llms/nodejs-plugin-config.txt

Testing (Node.js):
- Test runner and bsb-tests.json format:
  https://bsbcode.dev/llms/nodejs-tests.txt

Registry:
- Registry API LLM guide:
  https://io.bsbcode.dev/llms.txt
